body.u: My career began while I was still at school. I had thought for a long time, what I would likedlike to have done with my life. My appointment was made and I had to visit my careers officer, she was then going to try and decide on my career. I had already made up my mind. So she was no help at all. She asked me a few questions about the career which I wanted to lead. I told her the answer and that was that. She had been no much help at all. It lasted for about ten minutes which wasn’t hardly long enough to get a few questions and answers out. She told me the wage which I should earn, but this wasn’t exact. I more or less knew all this before I even entered her room. So that career interview didntdidn't do me much good.

I think that the choices of subjects are chosen much too late. They should have been chosen at about 12 years old. So the choice of career should come sooner. Another thing which I thought should have been done, was that the girls of the 5th form, also the boys, should have been taken round different jobs and try each job out to see which person is suited to which job.

Special subjects should be brought into the time table, so each person can get qualifications for the jobs which they would like to do. My career had been successful, but I am now glad to retire into the relaxing life.
